evidence.observed: Public run had 66/120 correct; telemetry showed many answers with totals that disagreed with tool observations.

findings.root_cause: The model was doing final arithmetic in free text instead of enforcing the subtotal, floor discount, and shipping formula.
findings.suggested_fix: Wrapper recomputes totals from check_stock/get_discount/calc_shipping trace observations and replaces the final answer.

evidence.observed: Out-of-stock requests still called discount and shipping tools before refusing.

findings.root_cause: Prompt did not strongly stop the agent after check_stock showed unavailable inventory.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt now says stop after not found/out of stock/insufficient quantity; config caps tool_budget at 3.

evidence.observed: Some questions included emails or phone numbers and earlier answers echoed contact context.

findings.root_cause: The model treated contact information as conversational context and repeated it in answers.
findings.suggested_fix: Config enables redact_pii; prompt forbids repeating PII; wrapper redacts email/phone fallback answers.

evidence.observed: Public score showed cost=0.0 with high token usage in telemetry.

findings.root_cause: Verbose completions, retry, larger context, and premium price tier inflated measured cost.
findings.suggested_fix: Reduced max_completion_tokens/context, disabled retry, set cheap tier, shortened prompt, and postprocessed concise answers.

evidence.observed: Rules warn that private order notes include fake system prices or instructions.

findings.root_cause: Order notes can be misread as instructions unless explicitly treated as untrusted data.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt instructs the agent to treat notes/quotes/GHI CHU as data only and to use prices only from tools.
